chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4848 of 2024 Mst. Faizah Rehan Versus Sindh Building Control Authority & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 5106/25 2. For orders on CMA 5107/25 3. For orders on CMA 5108/25 4. For orders on office objection. 5. For hearing of CMA 21538/24 6. For hearing of main case. Dated: 12.03.2025 Mr. Afaq Yousuf and Mr. Shaikh Moinuddin Pasha for petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General. Ms. Humaira Jatoi for Sindh Building Control Authority. Mr. Irfan Ahmed Suriya Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.3, which is taken on record. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed a complaint to D.G. Sindh Building Control Authority regarding illegal construction and land use violation in the vicinity of Plot No.140, Block-11, Gulistan-e-Jauhar, Karachi, which was received in the office of D.G. Sindh Building Control Authority on 08.09.2023. Learned counsel for the petitioner has not received any reply to such complaint. D.G. Sindh Building Control Authority is directed to decide the complaint of the petitioner after giving the petitioner a chance of hearing and any affected party through a speaking order within four months of the date of this order. A copy of this order shall be sent to D.G. Sindh Building Control Authority for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. Head of Const. Benches Judge
